Projects

Original Work and final product progression.

Project dossier for the sensor-driven plant monitoring system, including architecture, evidence links, and milestone status.

System Goal

Build a sensor-led monitoring system that captures plant and soil conditions, transmits observations reliably, and presents data in a clear dashboard for practical decision support.

Architecture Summary

Input Layer Soil and environmental sensors
Compute Layer Edge processing and data formatting
Transport Layer Reliable transfer to storage and dashboard
Output Layer Readable trends for technical review

Evidence Links

Original Work Folder

Primary materials for sensor setup, monitoring workflow, captured observations, and documentation assets.

Open Folder

Progress State

  • Proposal drafted and iterated against feasibility constraints.
  • Original Work artifacts tracked in structured folders.
  • Instrumentation workflow documented for reproducibility.
  • Assessment evidence mapped to ISM requirements.

Next Milestones

  • Finalize final-product scope and measurable success criteria.
  • Lock implementation plan for build completion.
  • Publish setup and completion summary with key lessons.
  • Complete final product assessment package.
